name: career-ops-plugin-big-boards
description: Aggregate job-board scan via Apify, pulling roles from LinkedIn, Indeed, ZipRecruiter, Glassdoor, and other Apify-reachable sources with full job-description capture.
author: Dax Davis <dax@rubicontv.com>

scripts.test: node test/scan-apify-core.test.mjs && node test/scan-apify.test.mjs && node test/index.test.mjs && node test/smoke.mjs
